findings.location: s1 — レジューム処理の流れ (1回目の実行)
findings.description: The source explicitly notes that steps 1–3 of the first execution repeat for each record: "（No1～3の処理を繰り返す）". This loop annotation is absent from the knowledge file, making the first-run flow appear to be a single-pass sequence rather than a per-record loop.

findings.location: s1 — レジューム処理の流れ (2回目の実行)
findings.description: The source notes that steps 2–5 of the second execution repeat until the end of the file: "（ファイル終端まで\ **No2～5**\ の処理を繰り返す）". The knowledge file describes the skip loop (step 3) but omits the outer repetition loop covering the main processing steps 2–5 through end-of-file.
findings.source_evidence: 「（ファイル終端まで\ **No2～5**\ の処理を繰り返す）」

findings.location: s1 — note about resume point execution count
findings.description: The source qualifies the mismatch between execution count and physical records with "データリーダの機能によっては" (depending on the data reader's functionality). The knowledge file drops this qualifier, making the mismatch sound unconditional.
findings.source_evidence: 「この実行回数は、データリーダの機能によってはファイルの物理的なレコードとは一致しない値となる。」
